category_sources: Official Fluent Bit manual describes it as a telemetry agent for logs, metrics, and traces.
source_facts.description says it is a fast and lightweight logs and metrics processor.
display_name_sources: Official manual title uses Fluent Bit.
source_facts.name is fluent-bit and source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
docs_sources: Official docs.fluentbit.io manual is the dedicated documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Fluent Bit manual states support for logs, metrics, and traces.
source_facts.description mentions logs and metrics processing.
